title: Fix Cirrus/Packer VM image building
body:
* Fix some encrypted values blocking image building.
* Add feature to only build images on PR merge if PR description has magic words (so we don't collect up a billion useless images).
* Centralize definitions used to name newly produced VM images.
* Add some documentation for the cirrus setup.

***CIRRUS: REBUILD IMAGES***

comments.body:
@baude mind take a quick peek when you get a moment?

Summary (Updated):
* Fix some encrypted values blocking image building.
* Add feature to only build images on PR merge if PR description has magic words (so we don't collect up a billion useless images).
* Centralize definitions used to name newly produced VM images.
* Add some documentation for the cirrus setup.
@baude We need you to review this?

@rhatdan ya, @baude knows the cirrus stuff pretty well.  Though most of its just bash, and this PR adds docs to describe the work-flow.  So (I would hope) just about anyone could wrap their head around it :smiley:
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #1660) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
Hrmmm, an actual integration-test failure.  Rebased again, and ``--force pushed``, hopefully that picked up a needed fix.

Drat, [failed twice in the same way.](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/task/5122418886574080/logs/integration_test.log)  It's the dreaded ``'cgroups: cgroup mountpoint does not exist'`` in both:

*  ``test.test_pods_ctnrs.TestPodsCtnrs``
*  ``test.test_pods_no_ctnrs.TestPodsNoCtnrs``

@jwhonce I thought Matt/Brent fixed the underlying issue, but maybe I'm misunderstanding things.  If it would help, I can put that IRC nagging back in so you can poke around inside the VM.  Let me know what I can do.

In the meanwhile, I'll smash the re-run button since this problem seems to be intermittent (other PR testing is passing).
@jwhonce nevermind, chatted with Matt about this.
@mheon @baude This PR is medium-important IMHO, it adds some docs, a fix, and a mechanism so we don't go crazy building new VM images on every merge.  PTAL when you have a mo (esp. at the docs).
Rebased against latest master and --force pushed.
@rhatdan @TomSweeneyRedHat @mheon @baude rebased, and green here, PTAL when you have a moment.
